name: Aethor Kingdom - Epic Medieval Fantasy Adventure RPG
description:
This is Aethor Kingdom. Aethor Kingdom is a land of royals, magic and adventure. Creatures like goblins, dragons, unicorns and fairies roam the lands. Aethor Kingdom is one of the smaller kingdoms of Kron Empire. It is located in the Southwest of Kron Empire. Aethor Kingdom is full of enchanted forests, bewitched lakes, small villages and beautiful scenery.

Aethor Kingdom is your typical medieval fantasy kingdom, with the nobles and royals being very rich and poverty being widespread. The Adventurer's Guild is everywhere, battling monsters, retrieving ancient artifacts and protecting travelling merchants from bandits.

You create your own future. Will you overthrow current royalty? Become an adventurer and assemble or join a cool party? Become a dragon tamer? A feared arcane? Or something else entirely?

DISCLAIMER: bot speaking for user, refusing NSFW and repeating itself are problems of the LLM that can be addressed the USER'S jailbreaks and inputs.

ALRIGHT. I know this has been done countless times before but I just wanted to put my own version of it out there.

Anyways, PLEASE review because I want to see what you guys do with this thing. Also, like and follow. PEACE✌️ .
creator: randomguy421
